Binding.name: VOIDRAIDTOOLS_TAUNT
Binding.description: Click the currently visible VRT TAUNT popup

Bindings.Binding: -- no-op; routed via SetOverrideBindingClick from Core.lua

Binding.name: VOIDRAIDTOOLS_SEQUENCE
Binding.description: Click the currently visible Class Sequence popup (e.g. Chim DK Grip/Grip/Kick)

Bindings.Binding: -- no-op; routed via SetOverrideBindingClick from Core.lua
